title: Article takes
description: A cached, LLM-generated reframing of an article — a TL;DR, an ELI5, or a personalized why-this-matters take — composed on demand by the explainer agent.

kind.description: which reframing: 'tldr' (3-bullet summary), 'eli5' (plain-language), or 'why-me' (why this matters to the reader given their followed topics)

body.description: the generated take, markdown; empty until ready

status.description: 'pending' while the explainer composes it, 'ready' when done, 'error' on failure
